subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-05 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: We have been driving in your lovely park. I found it so charming that I alighted from the automobile and walked along the pathways.
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @critique of Western values; culture, @education and the development of capacity, @Manifestation of God as sun
